belier.intro: The Moon journeys through Leo, a kindred fire sign, fanning your native flames into a brilliant blaze. This waxing crescent phase is your cosmic permission slip to be bold, to create, and to take center stage. The Sun in Gemini lends wit to your will, making your expression both powerful and articulate.
belier.love: Your heart speaks the grand language of romance today, demanding to be heard. Whether through a bold declaration or a playful gesture, let your affections shine without apology. Authenticity is your most magnetic quality right now.
belier.work: Step into the spotlight and share your vision with confidence. Your creative instincts are sharp and your enthusiasm is contagious, making it an ideal day to lead a project or pitch a passionate idea. Let your natural charisma open doors.
belier.energy: A surge of vitality courses through you, eager for an outlet. Channel this powerful current into physical activity that feels like play, celebrating the strength and joy of being in your body.
belier.intuition: Your intuition resides not in your mind, but in the very rhythm of your heart today. Trust the feeling of joyful expansion as your truest guide, for it points the way toward your most authentic path.
belier.mantra: I lead with a courageous and joyful heart.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon in dramatic Leo settles into the very foundation of your life, stirring the quiet waters of your home. This fiery lunar presence challenges your earthy need for calm, asking you to express your heart's desires with more courage, even if it feels like a stage performance in your own sanctuary.
taureau.love: Love may ask for a grander gesture today, a more open display of affection that can feel foreign to your subtle nature. Instead of resisting, see it as a chance to bring a little sunshine and playfulness into your most intimate connections.
taureau.work: Your mind is sharp when it comes to your resources, yet a deeper shift is happening in your career path. Do not mistake a quiet period of professional re-evaluation for stagnation; you are laying the groundwork for a more authentic ambition.
taureau.energy: The friction between your inner world and outer demands can feel taxing. Channel this dynamic energy into a physical task that beautifies your space- a garden, a room- to ground the fire.
taureau.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in whispers today, but with the bold roar of a lion. Trust the feeling that rises from the very core of your being, the one that knows what truly makes you feel secure.
taureau.mantra: My heart has a voice, and my home is its stage.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: With the Sun still blazing through your own sign, your natural wit is at its peak. Today, the waxing Moon in theatrical Leo lends a golden, heartfelt warmth to your words, turning simple conversations into captivating stories. This is a day to speak not just from your mind, but from the stage of your heart.
gemeaux.love: Your charm is magnetic, amplified by the Moon’s generous fire. Let playfulness lead the way in your connections; a shared laugh or a grand compliment can build a beautiful bridge. Express your affection with flair, for today, love appreciates a little drama and a lot of warmth.
gemeaux.work: Your ideas have a special radiance now, so do not hide them. Whether you're pitching a project or brainstorming with colleagues, infuse your logic with passion. The crescent Moon favors bold first steps, especially in creative communication or marketing.
gemeaux.energy: The combination of Air and Fire creates a buoyant, dynamic energy within you. You feel mentally sharp and socially confident, ready to connect and create. Channel this vitality into a lively activity that engages both your body and your quick mind.
gemeaux.intuition: Your intuition speaks through moments of creative inspiration and joyful self-expression. Listen to the ideas that make you feel alive and expansive, for they hold a deeper truth. As Hermes Trismegistus said, 'That which is Below corresponds to that which is Above,' and a spark of joy can illuminate a grand design.
gemeaux.mantra: I express my truth with joy and confidence.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: Your ruler, the Moon, basks in the generous warmth of Leo, stirring a desire for creative expression and heartfelt recognition. While the Sun finishes its journey through your house of secrets and dreams, you are weaving inner strength for your season ahead. This is a day for finding courage in vulnerability, like a first bud reaching for the sun.
cancer.love: Theatrical Leo energy infuses your emotions, asking you to be more open and playful with your affections. Don't hide your feelings; express them with the warmth of a summer afternoon. A grand gesture, even a small one, will be deeply appreciated and remembered.
cancer.work: Your most productive work happens behind the scenes today as you finalize projects and clear the slate. The Leo Moon illuminates your house of resources, however, sparking brilliant ideas about your self-worth and finances. A sudden insight may show you exactly what your creative talents are worth.
cancer.energy: A surge of solar confidence from the Leo Moon can make you feel more vibrant and playful than usual. Honor this burst of vitality with some creative activity, but listen to your body's deeper need for rest before your birthday season begins.
cancer.intuition: Your dreams may be especially vivid, carrying messages from your subconscious as the Sun lights up your twelfth house. Listen to your heart's intelligence today, that deep, central knowing that speaks without words. It is your most honest compass.
cancer.mantra: I express my heart with courage and warmth.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The young Moon makes its home in your own sign today, a silver crescent mirroring your heart's fire. This is a day to wear your spirit on the outside, allowing your innate radiance to be the first thing people see. Your ruler, the Sun, travels through social Gemini, urging you to share this vibrant light with your circle of friends and allies.
lion.love: Let your affections be bold and unambiguous, a clear flame for others to warm themselves by. True generosity of spirit is magnetic. Beneath the surface, a deeper current asks you to examine the flow of power in your closest bonds, ensuring the stage is truly shared.
lion.work: Your creative instincts are your most reliable compass right now, especially when it comes to presenting ideas. Do not shy away from the spotlight; your enthusiasm can inspire the entire team. Step forward and let your unique perspective illuminate the path.
lion.energy: Your inner furnace burns brightly, fueled by the Moon's presence in your sign. Channel this potent vitality into joyful movement or a creative passion, lest it become simple restlessness.
lion.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in whispers, but with the clear, resonant voice of your own heart. Trust the feeling of what makes you feel most alive and most authentically you - that is your truest guide today.
lion.mantra: I shine from the heart outward.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Sun in Gemini illuminates your public life, demanding clarity and wit, a language you speak fluently. Yet, the young crescent Moon slips into Leo in your most private, internal sector. A new creative flame is kindling within, not yet for the world to see, but for you to quietly nurture.
vierge.love: Your emotional world feels like a secret garden today, rich and vibrant but shielded from view. This isn't a time for grand declarations, but for understanding the unspoken currents that flow between you and another. True connection happens in the quiet spaces, away from the stage.
vierge.work: Your mind is sharp and your ideas are ready for an audience, thanks to the Sun in your house of career. Communicate your detailed plans with confidence. The most potent inspiration, however, may arise from a moment of quiet reflection, a spark from your subconscious.
vierge.energy: A current of warm, fiery energy is available, but it serves you best when directed inward. Use this vitality for creative solitude or restorative practices rather than pushing your physical limits. Conserve your strength for the tasks that truly matter.
vierge.intuition: Your intuition speaks through the language of the heart today, through symbols, dreams, and creative urges. Pay attention to the quiet whispers that arise when you are alone. Your inner world is a faithful guide, showing you the seeds of what is to come.
vierge.mantra: My quiet heart fuels my brilliant voice.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The waxing Moon in fiery Leo illuminates your sphere of friendships and future hopes, creating a beautiful harmony with the Sun in fellow air sign Gemini. It's a day where your social grace meets heartfelt creativity, asking you to share your light generously. Your innate desire for connection finds a warm and expressive stage on which to play.
balance.love: Your Venus-ruled heart responds to the Leo Moon's call for grander gestures and open affection. This is not a time for subtlety; let your warmth be seen and felt in your relationships. A shared laugh in a group of friends or a bold, creative date can bring you closer to another.
balance.work: Your diplomatic skills are infused with a creative confidence, making you a natural leader in collaborative projects. Ideas flow easily and your ability to inspire others is at a peak. Use this vibrant energy to network and present your vision with the charm and flair that comes so naturally to you.
balance.energy: The Leo Moon's steady fire fuels your airy nature, bestowing a vibrant and charismatic aura. You feel a pull towards social activities that get you moving, like a dance or a group walk in the sun. Channel this dynamic energy into something creative to feel balanced and alive.
balance.intuition: Your intuition speaks clearly through the language of joy and creative impulse today. Listen to the quiet pull towards people and projects that genuinely light you up from within. This inner resonance is your most trustworthy compass, guiding you toward authentic self-expression.
balance.mantra: I connect with others through authentic joy.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: A fiery Leo Moon illuminates your tenth house of public life, casting a spotlight on your ambitions. This call to be seen may feel bold for your private water nature, yet the Sun in clever Gemini lends you the words to articulate your deepest truths. Today, the world is your stage, and your profound intensity is your most compelling script.
scorpion.love: Relationships take on a more public dimension, as you might feel the urge to present a united front to the world. True connection, however, is nurtured in private moments, far from the applause. Remember what Hermes Trismegistus taught: 'As above, so below' - your outer bond must reflect your inner truth.
scorpion.work: Your professional life is energized, and your leadership qualities are impossible to ignore. The waxing crescent Moon encourages a bold first step on a project that requires your signature passion. Use this celestial theater to your advantage; your authority is not just felt, it is seen and acknowledged.
scorpion.energy: The Leo Moon provides a surge of dramatic, creative vitality that pushes you to perform and engage. This is an energizing fire, but be sure to tend to your inner waters, lest you burn too bright, too fast. Seek moments of quiet solitude to replenish your reserves.
scorpion.intuition: While the world demands your outer focus, your ruling planet Pluto, in retrograde, quietly excavates your foundations. Your intuition speaks in whispers about your roots, family, and what true security feels like. Listen closely, for these quiet inner shifts are the source of your greatest power.
scorpion.mantra: I express my depth with radiant confidence.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The waxing crescent Moon travels through Leo, a kindred fire sign, sending a current of warmth and confidence through your veins. This is not a day for quiet contemplation, but for bold beginnings. The Sun in Gemini illuminates your relationships, inviting you to share this new spark with another.
sagittaire.love: Your natural charisma is amplified, making connections feel effortless and joyful. Whether single or partnered, let your heart lead the conversation. A playful debate or a shared adventure can rekindle a flame or ignite a new one.
sagittaire.work: Your grand ideas find a receptive audience today, so do not hesitate to step into the spotlight. Present your vision with the passion it deserves, but remember the Gemini Sun’s lesson: listen to your partners to turn a good idea into a brilliant one.
sagittaire.energy: A surge of vitality courses through you, a gift from the harmonious fire in the sky. Channel this abundance into movement, creation, or play. Stagnation is your only adversary today.
sagittaire.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in whispers, but with the bold certainty of a lion's roar. Trust the feeling in your chest, the conviction that arises from your core. Your heart knows the opening lines of your next chapter.
sagittaire.mantra: I share my inner fire with generous joy.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The waxing crescent Moon shines in dramatic Leo today, illuminating the hidden depths of your life. This isn't your usual terrain of solid ground and patient climbing; it's a call to bring warmth and courage to matters of shared trust and resources. The Sun in Gemini offers you the mental agility to navigate these complex currents with grace.
capricorne.love: Forget practicality for a moment and let your heart speak with the warmth of a summer fire. The Leo Moon asks for emotional generosity, a willingness to be seen in your vulnerability. True intimacy is not a transaction; it is a shared flame.
capricorne.work: Your mind is sharp, focused on the details of your daily tasks, yet a deeper current flows beneath. A joint project or shared investment may demand your attention, calling for both careful analysis and a bold, creative vision. Build your structures, but build them with heart.
capricorne.energy: A surge of vitality may surprise you, coming from a deep, emotional wellspring. Channel this intensity into focused action rather than letting it simmer internally, as a strong walk can transform inner heat into outer strength.
capricorne.intuition: Your intuition speaks not in whispers but in the steady beat of a drum. Pay attention to the gut feelings that arise around trust and shared destinies. As Hermes Trismegistus taught, 'That which is Below corresponds to that which is Above'.
capricorne.mantra: I share my true self with courage.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon in Leo, your polar opposite, places a spotlight on your relationships and partnerships. This waxing crescent phase asks for a courageous step forward in how you relate to others, challenging you to bridge the gap between your intellectual self and your heart's true needs. With Pluto retrograde in your sign, every interaction is a mirror reflecting your own profound transformation.
verseau.love: Your emotional world craves warmth and recognition, a grand stage where you feel seen and admired. This may feel at odds with your usual detached nature, but today, vulnerability is your strength. Let your unique light shine in your connections, and dare to show the passionate heart beating beneath the cool exterior.
verseau.work: A collaboration takes center stage, demanding more creative flair and personal expression than pure logic. A partner's fiery enthusiasm can ignite your brilliant ideas, turning a solo concept into a shared masterpiece. Embrace the dynamic tension; it is the friction that creates the pearl.
verseau.energy: The fire of the Leo Moon can feel intense, but it is a powerful fuel for creative action. Channel this dramatic energy into a physical pursuit that feels like a performance, letting your body express the joy your mind is contemplating.
verseau.intuition: Your deepest insights today will come through the mirror of another person. Pay close attention to the feelings that your one-on-one encounters stir within you, for they are messengers from your subconscious.
verseau.mantra: My authenticity is a gift I bravely share.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The waxing Moon in fiery Leo illuminates your house of daily rituals, urging you to bring more heart and creativity into your routines. This contrasts with the Gemini Sun, which pulls your attention to the quiet sanctuary of your home. You are learning to bridge the gap between your private world and the small, meaningful ways you show up for life each day.
poissons.love: Affection is best expressed through grand gestures of simple service today. Tending to a partner's needs or offering heartfelt help speaks volumes more than flowery words. If you are seeking connection, notice who appreciates the quiet dedication you bring to your craft.
poissons.work: A spark of creative courage animates your work, asking you to take pride in what you do, no matter how humble the task. The Leo Moon encourages you to perform your duties with flair and passion. Your contribution is a form of artistry, so allow yourself to shine in your role.
poissons.energy: The fire of the Leo Moon can feel both invigorating and a little intense for your watery nature. Channel this vibrant energy into a physical practice you love, like dancing or a walk in the sun, to avoid feeling overwhelmed.
poissons.intuition: Your intuition speaks not through whispers, but through the courage of your heart. With Pluto retrograde in your spiritual twelfth house, you are dissolving old patterns from the inside out. Trust the feeling that tells you to be bolder and more self-expressed in your daily life.
poissons.mantra: My daily actions are an expression of my heart.
poissons.author: Sibylle
